味港軒.
情境領導力財商工作坊
Presented for CMB Wing Lung Bank
Harvard Situational Leadership Simulation

情境領導力 — 拯救香港餐飲業

Situational Leadership: Reviving Hong Kong's Restaurant Industry

一場以香港餐飲業真實困境為載體、融合哈佛情境領導力理論與財商思維的沉浸式商業決策演練。在資金緊縮與市場劇變中，帶領你的團隊制定拯救味港軒的完整方案。

An immersive business simulation rooted in Hong Kong's real F&B industry crisis, combining Harvard's Situational Leadership Theory with financial literacy, where teams make critical decisions to save a restaurant from decline.

★

哈佛情境領導力理論

Harvard Situational Leadership Theory

哈佛情境領導力理論（Situational Leadership Theory）由保羅·赫塞（Paul Hersey）與肯·布蘭查德（Ken Blanchard）於1969年提出，是全球最具影響力的領導力模型之一。該理論指出：沒有唯一的最佳領導方式，有效的領導者必須根據團隊成員的成熟度與任務情境，靈活調整領導風格——從指令型（Telling）、教練型（Selling）、支持型（Participating）到授權型（Delegating）。

在這個商業模擬中，你將親身體驗這一理論的精髓：面對瞬息萬變的市場環境，你的團隊是否能在資金緊張時果斷指揮？在資訊不明時民主協商？在高壓競標中迅速調整策略？這不僅是一場遊戲，更是對你真實領導潛能的壓力測試。

Developed by Paul Hersey and Ken Blanchard in 1969, Situational Leadership Theory is one of the world's most influential leadership models. It asserts that there is no single best style of leadership. Effective leaders must adapt their approach—spanning Directing, Coaching, Supporting, and Delegating—based on team maturity and situational context. In this simulation, you will experience this theory firsthand: Can your team command decisively when funds are tight? Collaborate democratically when information is scarce? Adapt strategy swiftly under competitive pressure? This is not merely a game—it is a stress test of your authentic leadership potential.

01

課程簡介

Course Introduction

「味港軒」是香港本土知名餐飲品牌，曾見證香港餐飲業的黃金時代。然而，受港人北上消費潮、成本高企、競爭白熱化與消費降級等多重衝擊，香港餐飲業正經歷嚴峻寒冬。數據顯示，行業月收入從 1.8M 跌至 1.0M，跌幅高達 45%。持牌食肆達 1.7 萬家，競爭者數量增長 11%，高端餐飲客單價下滑 14%。

作為味港軒新任首席執行官團隊，你們的任務是在有限預算內做出關鍵決策，通過參與策略事件拍賣，用資金鎖定效用最高的組合，制定拯救餐廳的完整方案。每個決策都將直接影響餐廳的生死存亡。

Wai Hong Hin once epitomised Hong Kong's thriving restaurant scene. Today the industry faces an existential crisis: monthly revenue has plummeted 45%, costs keep rising, and consumer behaviour has fundamentally shifted. As the new CEO team, you must make critical decisions under a tight budget, bidding on strategic revival events to craft a comprehensive turnaround plan. Every decision directly impacts the restaurant's survival.

02

核心規則

Core Rules
01

事件拍賣

Event Auction

每支團隊（3-5人）初始擁有 1,000萬港元 模擬資金，通過拍賣獲得拯救餐廳的策略事件。共 12 個策略性景氣拯救事件，涵蓋從農場到全渠道的完整產業鏈。各事件起拍價與加價幅度因策略價值而異。

Each team (3-5 members) starts with HK$10 million in simulated capital to bid on strategic revival events. Twelve events span the entire supply chain from farm to table. Opening bids and increments vary by strategic value.

02

策略規劃

Strategic Planning

遊戲開始前設有 5分鐘 策略討論時間。團隊需基於現時香港餐飲業數據與「決策四象限」思維框架，評估每個事件的優先級與最高出價，制定最優出價策略。強調：預算有限，必須做出取捨。

Teams have 5 minutes before the game to deliberate. Using real Hong Kong F&B data and the four-quadrant decision matrix, assess each event's priority and maximum bid. Emphasis: limited budget demands trade-offs.

03

分數結算與復盤

Score & Debrief

所有事件拍賣結束後，團隊計算獲得的事件效用分數總和。決策質量決定最終得分。隨後進行結構化復盤，從「體驗」走向「覺察」，將模擬經驗轉化為真實的領導力與財商洞察。

After all auctions, teams tally their acquired event utility scores. Decision quality determines the final ranking. A structured debrief then guides participants from experience to awareness, turning simulation insights into genuine leadership and financial literacy growth.

03

十二個策略事件

Twelve Strategic Events
S01 · 策略
與本地有機農場合作，推出 Farm-to-Table 有機菜單
Partner with local organic farms for a Farm-to-Table menu
供應鏈升級
S02 · 策略
建立中央廚房，標準化出品降低成本
Build a central kitchen to standardise output and reduce costs
規模化運營
S03 · 策略
引入自動化廚房設備，降低人力成本
Introduce automated kitchen equipment to cut labour costs
科技賦能
S04 · 策略
開設外賣專用雲廚房，入駐 KeeTa / Foodpanda
Launch a cloud kitchen for delivery on KeeTa and Foodpanda
渠道拓展
S05 · 策略
打造網紅打卡點，創造社交傳播內容
Create an Instagram-worthy hotspot for viral social content
品牌營銷
S06 · 策略
IP 聯名主題月，聯名熱門動漫 / 遊戲 IP
Host an IP collaboration month with popular anime or gaming brands
流量變現
S07 · 策略
轉型平價快餐，推出一人食套餐
Pivot to affordable fast dining with single-serve set meals
客群下沉
S08 · 策略
社交媒體矩陣營銷，小紅書 + Instagram + KOL 探店
Deploy social media marketing across Xiaohongshu, Instagram and KOLs
數字營銷
S09 · 策略
銀行合作餐飲優惠計劃（與招商永隆銀行合作）
Partner with CMB Wing Lung Bank for dining rewards programme
金融賦能
S10 · 策略
開發預製菜產品線，進軍超市渠道
Develop a ready-meal product line for supermarket retail
第二曲線
S11 · 策略
多時段經營，早市茶點 / 下午茶 / 招牌晚餐
Operate multiple dayparts: breakfast, afternoon tea and signature dinner
時段優化
S12 · 策略
拓展企業食堂承包與活動餐飲外包服務（B2B業務）
Expand into corporate canteen and event catering contracts (B2B)
B2B拓展
04

決策思維四象限

Decision Matrix
速贏 Quick Wins
投入較少，回報較高
如：社交媒體矩陣營銷、銀行合作優惠
Low effort, high return. E.g. social media marketing, bank partnership rewards
重大項目 Major Projects
投入較大，回報也高
如：中央廚房、自動化設備、預製菜產品線
High effort, high return. E.g. central kitchen, automation, ready-meal product line
填補性工作 Fill-ins
投入較少，回報一般
如：多時段經營、Farm-to-Table
Low effort, moderate return. E.g. multi-daypart operation, Farm-to-Table
吃力不討好 Thankless
投入較大，回報有限
如：轉型平價快餐、IP 聯名主題月
High effort, low return. E.g. budget dining pivot, IP collaboration month

低付出 Low Effort ← → 高付出 High Effort      低收益 Low Return ↑ ↓ 高收益 High Return

05

學習收穫

Learning Outcomes
掌握情境領導力與決策四象限
Master Situational Leadership
學會根據資源與情境靈活調整策略，運用「速贏、重大項目、填補性工作、吃力不討好」四象限工具進行高效決策。
Learn to adapt strategy based on resources and context, using the four-quadrant decision matrix for efficient prioritisation.
提升高壓環境下的財商決策力
Sharpen Financial Decision-Making
在資訊不完整、資金有限的條件下，訓練快速分析與果斷決策的能力。將「有限預算」轉化為「最優配置」的財商思維。
Develop the ability to analyse and decide decisively with incomplete information and limited funds.
鍛鍊團隊協作與商業談判技巧
Hone Teamwork & Negotiation
通過小組討論與拍賣競標，提升團隊內部溝通、共識達成與策略執行能力。學會在競爭中尋找合作空間。
Practise team deliberation and auction bidding to elevate communication and consensus-building skills.
建立金融合作與成本管控思維
Build Financial Partnership Awareness
通過與招商永隆銀行合作的模擬事件，理解跨界金融合作的商業價值，建立成本意識與風險評估框架。
Through the simulated CMB Wing Lung Bank partnership event, understand cross-sector financial collaboration value.
06

復盤總結

Debriefing Session

遊戲結束後設置 結構化復盤環節，引導學員從「體驗」走向「覺察」，從「覺察」提煉「洞察」。每一個問題都是將模擬經驗轉化為真實領導力與財商成長的關鍵橋樑。

A structured debrief follows the simulation, guiding participants from experience to awareness, and from awareness to insight.

Q1
你們是怎麼做決策和行動的？
How did you make decisions and take action?
💡
識別團隊決策風格中的高槓桿點，理解哪些時刻的選擇對結果影響最大。反思「速贏」與「重大項目」之間的權衡策略。
Identify high-leverage moments in team decision-making and reflect on the trade-off between quick wins and major projects.
Q2
資金花得值嗎？有沒有過度競價？
Was the money well spent? Any over-bidding?
💡
培養對資金效率的敏感度，建立「成本—收益」分析思維。理解有限預算下如何實現效用最大化。
Cultivate sensitivity to capital efficiency and build a cost-benefit analytical mindset.
Q3
如果重來一次，你會改變什麼？
What would you do differently if you could replay?
💡
透過回溯性反思，將遊戲經驗轉化為可遷移的決策洞察。讓每一次「錯誤」都成為下一次成功的養分。
Transform game experience into transferable decision-making insights through retrospective reflection.
Q4
這與現實生活中的理財和領導有什麼聯繫？
How does this connect to real-life finance and leadership?
💡
搭建從模擬場景到真實職場與生活的認知橋樑，將抽象的財商與領導力概念轉化為具體可行的行動方案。
Build a cognitive bridge from simulation to real life, turning abstract financial literacy and leadership concepts into actionable behaviours.
味港軒.
情境領導力財商工作坊 — 拯救香港餐飲業
適合對象 Target Audience
中學生、大學生、青年領袖、企業內訓、財商教育團體（3-5人 / 組）
Secondary & university students, youth leaders, corporate training, financial literacy groups (3-5 per team)
課程標籤 Tags
情境領導力 商業模擬 財商教育 拍賣決策 香港文化
